input_text: Kedai dobi ni kena bayar extra kalau baju ada noda. Padahal tu lah sebab orang hantar dobi. Logik macam mana?
reason: Laundry charging extra for stains, defeating the purpose of the service.
suggested_rewrite: Caj tambahan untuk noda perlu dinyatakan dengan jelas sebelum pelanggan menghantar pakaian. Bandingkan harga antara kedai dobi.

input_text: Parking structure at the mall is confusing. No clear signs. Spent 20 minutes trying to find my car. Stressful with kids.
reason: Mall parking structure has poor signage causing stress for families.
suggested_rewrite: Mall parking should have clear zone markers, color coding, and digital displays showing available spots. Consider using parking apps that save your location.

input_text: 公共图书馆的开放时间太短了。早上十点才开门，下午五点就关了。上班族根本没法去。
reason: Public library hours too short for working adults to visit.
suggested_rewrite: 公共图书馆应延长开放时间至晚上和周末。建议向市议会提出延长时间的请求。

input_text: Nak renew lesen memandu pun kena tunggu 3 jam kat JPJ. Online system selalu down. Tak efficient langsung.
reason: 3-hour wait for license renewal at JPJ with unreliable online system.
suggested_rewrite: JPJ perlu meningkatkan kapasiti sistem dalam talian dan menawarkan pembaharuan lesen di kiosk automatik di pusat membeli-belah.

input_text: The school bus picks up my child at 6 AM but school starts at 7:30 AM. Kids are forced to wait 1.5 hours at school doing nothing.
reason: School bus schedule forcing children to wait 1.5 hours before class starts.
suggested_rewrite: Schools should provide morning supervision programs or coordinate bus schedules closer to school start times. Raise this with the PIBG.

input_text: 每次打电话给银行客服，等了半小时才有人接。然后还被转来转去，问题没解决。
reason: Bank customer service long wait times with constant transfers and no resolution.
suggested_rewrite: 银行客服效率问题可以向BNM投诉。同时利用银行的网上投诉渠道以获得书面记录。

input_text: Pasar malam ni start pukul 4 petang tapi road closure dari pukul 2. Susah orang nak balik kerja guna jalan tu.
reason: Night market road closures starting too early disrupting commuters.
suggested_rewrite: PBT perlu mengkaji semula waktu penutupan jalan supaya tidak mengganggu waktu puncak. Laluan alternatif perlu disediakan.

input_text: Gym membership auto-renew without warning. Tried to cancel but they say minimum 6 months contract. Nobody told me when I signed up.
reason: Gym auto-renewal without warning and undisclosed minimum contract terms.
suggested_rewrite: Auto-renewal terms must be clearly disclosed at signup. File a complaint with the Consumer Tribunal if the contract was misleading.

input_text: Bilik mesyuarat kat pejabat kerajaan tak cukup. Officer kena share meja. Macam mana nak kerja productive?
reason: Government office lacking meeting rooms forcing desk sharing, reducing productivity.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah ruang pejabat perlu ditangani melalui permohonan bajet kepada KKR. Penyelesaian sementara termasuk jadual penggunaan bilik yang teratur.

input_text: 这栋公寓的垃圾槽经常堵塞。臭味弥漫到每个楼层。投诉了很多次管理层都不理。
reason: Apartment garbage chute frequently clogged with smell on every floor and unresponsive management.
suggested_rewrite: 如果管理层不回应，联合邻居向建筑物委员会正式投诉。严重卫生问题可以向卫生局报告。

input_text: Nak dapatkan salinan sijil lahir anak kena tunggu 2 minggu. Emergency case pun sama. Tak ada fast track option.
reason: 2-week wait for birth certificate copy with no expedited option for emergencies.
suggested_rewrite: JPN perlu menyediakan perkhidmatan ekspres untuk kes kecemasan. Pemohon boleh bertanya tentang surat pengesahan sementara.

input_text: My condo swimming pool has been closed for 'maintenance' for 3 months. No updates from management. But maintenance fee still charged.
reason: Condo pool closed 3 months with no updates but maintenance fees still collected.
suggested_rewrite: Request a formal timeline for pool repairs at the next AGM. Extended closure should warrant a reduction in maintenance fees for affected amenities.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku tak ada kaunselor sepenuh masa. Kaunselor datang seminggu sekali je. Mental health budak-budak macam mana?
reason: School counselor only visiting once a week instead of full-time, mental health concern for students.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap sekolah perlu sekurang-kurangnya seorang kaunselor sepenuh masa. Ibu bapa boleh mengemukakan keperluan ini kepada PIBG dan Jabatan Pendidikan.

input_text: 药房的药价比医院贵三倍。同样的药，为什么价格差这么多？
reason: Pharmacy prices three times higher than hospital for the same medication.
suggested_rewrite: 药品价格差异问题可以向KPDNHEP查询。比较不同药房的价格并考虑使用仿制药以降低成本。

input_text: Lift rumah flat kos rendah ni selalu rosak. Warga emas kena naik tangga 12 tingkat. Ada yang pengsan. Siapa nak tanggung?
reason: Low-cost flat elevator frequently broken forcing elderly to climb 12 floors.
suggested_rewrite: Lif rosak di flat kos rendah adalah isu keselamatan serius. Laporkan kepada PBT dan minta pembaikan segera. Kes kecemasan perlu eskalasi kepada Bomba.

input_text: The recycling bins in my area are always contaminated with regular trash. Recycling efforts wasted because nobody educates residents.
reason: Recycling bins contaminated by regular trash due to lack of resident education.
suggested_rewrite: Effective recycling requires community education. Suggest your RA organize workshops and use clear signage on bins showing what goes where.

input_text: Stesen minyak kat highway ni mark up harga. Satu ringgit lebih mahal dari stesen kat bandar. Monopoli betul.
reason: Highway petrol stations marking up prices significantly compared to city stations.
suggested_rewrite: Harga minyak di stesen lebuh raya dikawal. Jika harga melebihi harga siling, laporkan kepada KPDNHEP dengan bukti resit.

input_text: 这个社区的路灯已经坏了两个月。晚上走路很危险。报警了也没人来修。
reason: Broken street lights in community for two months creating safety hazard.
suggested_rewrite: 街灯维修应向地方议员和市议会报告。使用官方投诉渠道（如电子邮件）保留书面记录。

input_text: Nak apply bantuan sekolah untuk anak, borang kena isi 10 muka surat. Orang kampung yang tak pandai tulis macam mana?
reason: School aid application requiring 10-page form inaccessible to rural less-literate parents.
suggested_rewrite: Borang bantuan perlu dipermudahkan. Pihak sekolah boleh menyediakan khidmat bantuan mengisi borang untuk ibu bapa yang memerlukan.

input_text: Every time it rains the underpass near my house floods. City hall says it's normal. How is flooding a public road normal?
reason: Underpass flooding during rain dismissed as normal by city hall.
suggested_rewrite: Regular flooding is an infrastructure failure, not normal. Document incidents with photos and dates, then file a formal complaint with JPS and your ADUN.

input_text: Jiran bising gila main muzik sampai pukul 3 pagi. Report kat polis pun diorang cakap bukan kecemasan. Ganggu kesihatan mental.
reason: Neighbor playing loud music until 3am with police dismissing noise complaints.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan bunyi bising boleh dibuat di PBT di bawah undang-undang kecil kawalan bunyi bising. Kumpulkan bukti rakaman sebagai sokongan aduan.

input_text: 学校周围的小贩卖不健康的油炸零食给孩子们。没有任何健康检查。
reason: Street vendors selling unhealthy fried snacks to children near schools without health checks.
suggested_rewrite: 校园周边食品安全需要关注。向KPDNHEP和卫生局报告无证小贩。学校也应加强健康饮食教育。

input_text: Nak buat aduan online pasal jalan rosak tapi website majlis rosak jugak. Ironi betul.
reason: Council website for road complaints is itself broken, ironic infrastructure failure.
suggested_rewrite: Cuba gunakan saluran alternatif seperti media sosial rasmi majlis atau hubungi pejabat terus melalui telefon.

input_text: Insurance claim for flood damage took 6 months to process. By that time, secondary mold damage cost more than the original flood.
reason: 6-month insurance claim processing for flood causing secondary mold damage exceeding original loss.
suggested_rewrite: Long claim delays can be escalated through BNM's complaints process. Document all secondary damage with photos and receipts to include in your claim.

input_text: Kedai hardware caj harga berlainan ikut muka pelanggan. Kalau nampak tak reti, mark up double. Tak ada standard pricing.
reason: Hardware store price discrimination based on customer appearance, no standard pricing.
suggested_rewrite: Sentiasa minta sebut harga bertulis dan bandingkan dengan kedai lain sebelum membeli. Harga tidak wajar boleh dilaporkan kepada KPDNHEP.

input_text: 公寓的访客停车位总是被住户霸占。有人把自己的第二辆车停在那里。管理层不管。
reason: Condo visitor parking taken by residents' second cars with no management enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: 访客停车位滥用问题应在业主大会上提出。建议管理层使用访客通行证制度并对违规者开罚单。

input_text: Bas sekolah naik harga tiga kali dalam setahun. Mak ayah nak hantar anak sendiri tapi kerja. Tersepit betul.
reason: School bus fare increased three times in one year squeezing working parents.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga bas sekolah perlu dipantau. Kumpulan ibu bapa boleh berunding secara kolektif dengan pengusaha bas untuk kadar yang berpatutan.

input_text: Fire hydrant near my house hasn't been tested in years. Paintwork is peeling and valve looks stuck. What if there's a fire?
reason: Fire hydrant near residence untested for years with visibly stuck valve.
suggested_rewrite: Report non-functional fire hydrants to the Fire and Rescue Department. Regular testing is mandated; untested hydrants are a serious safety hazard.

input_text: Aku beli rumah subsale tapi developer tak nak transfer maintenance deposit. Kena bayar dua kali. Penipuan ni.
reason: Developer refusing to transfer maintenance deposit for subsale, buyer paying double.
suggested_rewrite: Deposit penyelenggaraan perlu dipindahkan semasa penjualan subsale. Dapatkan nasihat daripada Tribunal Tuntutan Pembeli Rumah.

input_text: வீட்டுக்கு அருகில் உள்ள கால்வாய் அடைப்பு நீண்ட காலமாக சரி செய்யப்படவில்லை. மழைக்காலத்தில் வெள்ளம் வருகிறது.
reason: Long-standing drain blockage near house causing flooding during rainy season.
suggested_rewrite: கால்வாய் அடைப்பை உடனடியாக நகராட்சிக்கு புகார் செய்யுங்கள். வெள்ள அபாயம் உள்ள பகுதிகளுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Budak sekolah kena bayar sendiri untuk buku aktiviti yang sepatutnya percuma. Cikgu paksa beli. RM50 setiap satu.
reason: Students forced to pay RM50 for activity books that should be free.
suggested_rewrite: Buku aktiviti percuma tidak sepatutnya dijual. Laporkan kepada PPD jika sekolah mengenakan bayaran untuk bahan yang dibiayai kerajaan.

input_text: My elderly father's wheelchair ramp at the government building is too steep. He almost fell backwards. ADA compliance is a joke here.
reason: Government building wheelchair ramp dangerously steep, accessibility compliance failure.
suggested_rewrite: Wheelchair ramps must meet Malaysian Standards MS 1184. Report non-compliant ramps at government buildings to JKR and the Disability Rights Division.

input_text: Nak register anak masuk tadika kerajaan kena datang beratur pukul 4 pagi. Yang datang lambat takde tempat. Sistem kuno.
reason: Government kindergarten registration requiring 4am queuing, outdated first-come system.
suggested_rewrite: Pendaftaran tadika kerajaan perlu bertukar kepada sistem dalam talian. Peruntukan tempat secara loteri atau berasaskan zon lebih adil.

input_text: 每次去邮局寄包裹都要等一个多小时。只有两个柜台开。其他柜台全部关着。
reason: Post office with only 2 counters open causing hour-long waits.
suggested_rewrite: 邮局应根据高峰时段开放更多柜台。消费者可以通过Pos Malaysia的在线投诉渠道反映服务问题。

input_text: Clinic waiting time 4 hours but consultation only 5 minutes. Doctor don't even look at you properly. Assembly line medicine.
reason: 4-hour clinic wait for 5-minute consultation, assembly line healthcare experience.
suggested_rewrite: Consider requesting a specific appointment time or using clinic apps that show real-time wait estimates. Feedback to KKM helps improve service quality.

input_text: Rumah yang baru beli dah mula bocor selepas 2 bulan. Panggil developer datang check, kata bukan tanggungjawab mereka. DLP konon.
reason: New house leaking after 2 months with developer refusing DLP responsibility.
suggested_rewrite: Kebocoran dalam tempoh DLP (Defect Liability Period) adalah tanggungjawab developer. Failkan tuntutan di Tribunal Tuntutan Pembeli Rumah dengan bukti bergambar.

input_text: இங்கு பொது கழிவறைகள் இல்லை. குழந்தைகளுடன் வெளியில் செல்வது மிகவும் கடினம்.
reason: No public toilets in the area making outings with children very difficult.
suggested_rewrite: பொது கழிவறை வசதிகள் அனைத்து பகுதிகளிலும் அவசியம். உள்ளூர் நகராட்சியிடம் கோரிக்கை வைக்கலாம்.

input_text: Toll rate increase again but road quality still the same. Potholes everywhere. Where does the money go?
reason: Toll rate increasing while road quality remains poor with potholes.
suggested_rewrite: Toll concessionaires are required to maintain road quality. Report potholes through PLUS or highway operator apps and file complaints with LLM if standards aren't met.

input_text: Nak buat pasport baru kena tunggu 2 bulan sebab 'high demand'. Negara lain boleh buat dalam seminggu. Kita bila lagi?
reason: 2-month passport wait due to high demand while other countries process in a week.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk mempercepat permohonan pasport, gunakan perkhidmatan premium di pejabat imigresen terpilih. Rancang permohonan lebih awal sebelum tempoh diperlukan.

input_text: 学校门口的斑马线都褪色了。车子根本看不到。昨天差点撞到一个孩子。
reason: Faded zebra crossing near school nearly causing child to be hit by car.
suggested_rewrite: 立即向JKR和学校管理层报告褪色的斑马线。附近应安装减速带和学校区域警示牌。

input_text: Kawasan perumahan baru ni takde playground langsung. Developer cakap akan buat tapi dah 3 tahun masih kosong.
reason: Developer promised playground in housing area 3 years ago, still empty.
suggested_rewrite: Taman permainan yang dijanjikan boleh dituntut melalui Tribunal Pembeli Rumah. Semak SPA untuk kemudahan yang dijanjikan.

input_text: Broadband coverage in rural Sabah is terrible. City people don't understand we still can't even load a webpage properly.
reason: Poor broadband coverage in rural Sabah creating digital divide.
suggested_rewrite: The digital divide in Sabah needs urgent attention under JENDELA. Report coverage gaps to MCMC and request satellite internet options through the KKDW program.

input_text: Nak tukar nama kat MyKad sebab salah ejaan pun kena tunggu 6 bulan. Padahal kesilapan JPN sendiri.
reason: 6-month wait to correct JPN's own spelling error on MyKad.
suggested_rewrite: Pembetulan kesilapan JPN sepatutnya diproses sebagai kes keutamaan. Dapatkan surat pengesahan sementara sambil menunggu MyKad baru.

input_text: 这个地区的自来水时常变黄。煮开了也不敢喝。只能买瓶装水。额外开销。
reason: Discolored tap water in the area forcing residents to buy bottled water.
suggested_rewrite: 变色的自来水应立即向SPAN和水务公司报告。保留水样作为证据并要求免费水质检测。

input_text: Rumah sewa naik 30% sekali gus tanpa notis. Tuan rumah kata ikut market rate. Penyewa macam mana nak cope?
reason: 30% rent increase without notice, landlord citing market rate.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan sewa perlu mengikut terma perjanjian sewa. Jika tiada klausa kenaikan, penyewa boleh merujuk kepada Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna.

input_text: Government hospital appointment system is hopeless. Given date 4 months away for specialist. Might as well self-medicate.
reason: 4-month wait for specialist appointment at government hospital.
suggested_rewrite: Long specialist waits can be managed by requesting urgent referrals from your GP. Some hospitals offer walk-in specialist clinics for pressing cases.
